entry.title: 「CodeForces 407C」 Curious Array
entry.summary:
You've got an array consisting of n integers: a[1], a[2], ..., a[n]. Moreover, there are m queries, each query can be described by three integers li, ri, ki. Query li, ri, ki means that we should add to each element a[j], where li ≤ j ≤ ri.

Record means the binomial coefficient, or the number of combinations from y elements into groups of x elements.

You need to fulfil consecutively all queries and then print the final array.
entry.content:
You've got an array consisting of n integers: a[1], a[2], ..., a[n]. Moreover, there are m queries, each query can be described by three integers li, ri, ki. Query li, ri, ki means that we should add to each element a[j], where li ≤ j ≤ ri.

Record means the binomial coefficient, or the number of combinations from y elements into groups of x elements.

You need to fulfil consecutively all queries and then print the final array.

链接🔗

「CodeForces 407C」Curious Array

题解

MILLOPE 的题解

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+100;
const int mod = 1e9+7;
typedef long long LL;
int n,m;
long long a[maxd],c[maxd][105],ans[maxd][105];
void init()
{
    c[0][0] = 1ll; 
    for (int i = 1; i < maxd; ++i) {
        c[i][0] = 1ll; 
        for (int j = 1; j <= i && j < 105; ++j) {
            c[i][j] = (1ll * c[i-1][j-1] + c[i-1][j]) % mod; 
        }
    }
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    init();
    scanf("%d%d",&n,&m);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%lld",&a[i]);
    for(int j=1;j<=m;j++)
    {
        int l,r,k;
        scanf("%d %d %d",&l,&r,&k);
        // 
        for(int i=0;i<=k;i++) ans[l][i] =  (1ll * ans[l][i] + c[k][k-i]) %mod;
        // 减去前缀和
        for(int i=0;i<=k;i++) ans[r+1][i] =  (1ll *ans[r+1][i] - c[r-l+k+1][k-i]) %mod;
    }
    for (int i = 1; i < n; ++i) 
        for (int j = 101; j >= 1; --j) 
            ans[i+1][j-1] = (1ll * ans[i+1][j-1] + ans[i][j] + ans[i][j-1]) % mod; 
    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i)  printf("%lld ",((ans[i][0] + a[i]) % mod + mod) % mod); 
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「AtCoder 131E」 Friendships
entry.summary: Does there exist an undirected graph with N vertices satisfying the following conditions?
entry.content:
Does there exist an undirected graph with N vertices satisfying the following conditions?

The graph is simple and connected.
The vertices are numbered 1,2,…,N.
Let M be the number of edges in the graph. The edges are numbered 1,2,…,M, the length of each edge is 1, and Edge i connects Vertex ui and Vertex vi.
There are exactly K pairs of vertices (i, j) (i < j) such that the shortest distance between them is 2.
If there exists such a graph, construct an example.

链接🔗

「AtCoder 131E」 Friendships

题解

考虑菊花图，能得到最大点的值，因为没有边的限制，所以在菊花图上，枚举非菊花心以外的任意两点，即可将贡献-1，这样便能构造出所有点

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;

int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int n,k;
    scanf("%d %d",&n,&k);
    int ans = (n-1)*(n-2)/2;
    if(ans < k)
    {
        printf("-1");
    }
    else
    {
        printf("%d\n",n-1 + ans - k );
        for(int i=2;i<=n;i++)
            printf("%d %d\n",1,i);

        for(int i=2;i<=n;i++)
            for(int j=i+1;j<=n;j++)
            {
                if(ans == k) return 0;
                printf("%d %d\n",i,j);
                ans--;
                
            }
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1234E」Special Permutations
entry.summary: Let's define 𝑝𝑖(𝑛) as the following permutation: [𝑖,1,2,…,𝑖−1,𝑖+1,…,𝑛]. This means that the 𝑖-th permutation is almost identity (i.e. which maps every element to itself) permutation but the element 𝑖 is on the first position. Examples:
entry.content:
Let's define 𝑝𝑖(𝑛) as the following permutation: [𝑖,1,2,…,𝑖−1,𝑖+1,…,𝑛]. This means that the 𝑖-th permutation is almost identity (i.e. which maps every element to itself) permutation but the element 𝑖 is on the first position. Examples:

𝑝1(4)=[1,2,3,4];
𝑝2(4)=[2,1,3,4];
𝑝3(4)=[3,1,2,4];
𝑝4(4)=[4,1,2,3].
You are given an array 𝑥1,𝑥2,…,𝑥𝑚 (1≤𝑥𝑖≤𝑛).

Let 𝑝𝑜𝑠(𝑝,𝑣𝑎𝑙) be the position of the element 𝑣𝑎𝑙 in 𝑝. So, 𝑝𝑜𝑠(𝑝1(4),3)=3,𝑝𝑜𝑠(𝑝2(4),2)=1,𝑝𝑜𝑠(𝑝4(4),4)=1.

Let's define a function 𝑓(𝑝)=∑𝑖=1𝑚−1|𝑝𝑜𝑠(𝑝,𝑥𝑖)−𝑝𝑜𝑠(𝑝,𝑥𝑖+1)|, where |𝑣𝑎𝑙| is the absolute value of 𝑣𝑎𝑙. This function means the sum of distances between adjacent elements of 𝑥 in 𝑝.

Your task is to calculate 𝑓(𝑝1(𝑛)),𝑓(𝑝2(𝑛)),…,𝑓(𝑝𝑛(𝑛)).

链接🔗

「CodeForces 1234E」Special Permutations

题解

两部分
第一部分是P(i) 时，第i个数值的修改，会印象到pos-1与pos+1的点，这里修改时间复制度是O(n)的
第二部分是小于i的值都会+1，如果当前修改位i,如果存在两个相邻的值为x,y，切 x < i < y 或 y < i < x ,那么就会存在贡献减少的情况，这里可以用树状数组统计下，然后每次枚举点的时候删除即可

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
vector<int> vis[maxd];
int n,m,a[maxd];
int abs(int x)
{
	if(x < 0) return -x;
	return x;
}
int t[maxd<<1];
void add(int x,int v)
{
	for(;x<maxd*2;x+=(x&-x)) t[x]+=v;
}
int query(int x)
{
	int sum = 0;
	for(;x;x-=(x&-x)) sum += t[x];
	return sum;
}
int main()
{
	// freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
	// freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
	scanf("%d %d",&n,&m);
	for(int i=1;i<=m;i++) 
	{
		scanf("%d",&a[i]);
		vis[a[i]].push_back(i);
	}
	long long ans = 0ll;
	for(int i=2;i<=m;i++) 
	{
		ans += abs(a[i] - a[i-1]);
		int x = a[i], y = a[i-1];
		if(x > y) swap(x,y);
		if(y - x > 1)
		{
			add(x+1,1);
			add(y,-1);
		}
	}
	//printf("%lld ",ans);
	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
	{
		long long sum = ans;
		sum -= query(i);
		//printf("%d %lld\n",i,sum);
		for(int j=0;j<vis[i].size();j++)
		{
			int pos = vis[i][j];
			int x = a[pos-1],y = a[pos+1];
			//printf("	%d %d %d\n",pos,x,y);
			if(x != i && x) 
			{
				sum -= abs(i - x);
				if(x<i) sum += x;
				else sum+= 	x-1;
			}
			if(y != i && y)
			{
				sum -= abs(i-y);
				if(y<i) sum+=y;
				else sum+= y-1;
			}
		}
		printf("%lld\n",sum);
	}
 
	return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1234F」Yet Another Substring Reverse
entry.summary:
You are given a string 𝑠 consisting only of first 20 lowercase Latin letters ('a', 'b', ..., 't').

Recall that the substring 𝑠[𝑙;𝑟] of the string 𝑠 is the string 𝑠𝑙𝑠𝑙+1…𝑠𝑟. For example, the substrings of "codeforces" are "code", "force", "f", "for", but not "coder" and "top".
entry.content:
You are given a string 𝑠 consisting only of first 20 lowercase Latin letters ('a', 'b', ..., 't').

Recall that the substring 𝑠[𝑙;𝑟] of the string 𝑠 is the string 𝑠𝑙𝑠𝑙+1…𝑠𝑟. For example, the substrings of "codeforces" are "code", "force", "f", "for", but not "coder" and "top".

You can perform the following operation no more than once: choose some substring 𝑠[𝑙;𝑟] and reverse it (i.e. the string 𝑠𝑙𝑠𝑙+1…𝑠𝑟 becomes 𝑠𝑟𝑠𝑟−1…𝑠𝑙).

Your goal is to maximize the length of the maximum substring of 𝑠 consisting of distinct (i.e. unique) characters.

The string consists of distinct characters if no character in this string appears more than once. For example, strings "abcde", "arctg" and "minecraft" consist of distinct characters but strings "codeforces", "abacaba" do not consist of distinct characters.

链接🔗

「CodeForces 1234F」Yet Another Substring Reverse

题解

反转等价于找段字符串，使得他们之间没有字符相同，并且长度只和最长
状压状压，DP[i] 表示选取二进制位选取与不选取的最长长度，如果选取了某段，那么与它不同的另一段等于 DP[((1<<m)-1)^1],枚举统计最大情况

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e6+10;
char s[maxd];
int dp[1<<21],vis[21];
int main()
{
	// freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
	// freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
	scanf("%s",s);
	for(int i=0;s[i];i++)
	{
		int now = 0 , cnt = 0;
		memset(vis,0,sizeof(vis));
		for(int j=i;s[j];j++)
		{
			int x = s[j]-'a';
			if(vis[x]) break;
			vis[x] =1; now |= (1<<x) ;
			cnt++;
			dp[now] = cnt;
		}
	}
	for(int i=0;i<(1<<20);i++)
		for(int j=0;j<20;j++)
			if(i & (1<<j)) 
				dp[i] = max(dp[i],dp[i^(1<<j)]); // 选取子集中最大方案数量
	int ans = 0;
	for(int i=0;i<(1<<20);i++)
		ans = max(ans,dp[i] + dp[i ^ ((1<<20) - 1)]);
	printf("%d",ans);
	return 0;
}

entry.title: 「AtCoder 138F」Coincidence
entry.summary: Given are integers L and R. Find the number, modulo 109+710^9+7109+7, of pairs of integers (x,y)(L≤x≤y≤R)(x,y) (L≤x≤y≤R)(x,y)(L≤x≤y≤R) such that the remainder when y is divided by x is equal to y[mbox]XORxy[mbox]XORxy[mbox]XORx.
entry.content:
Given are integers L and R. Find the number, modulo 109+710^9+7109+7, of pairs of integers (x,y)(L≤x≤y≤R)(x,y) (L≤x≤y≤R)(x,y)(L≤x≤y≤R) such that the remainder when y is divided by x is equal to y[mbox]XORxy[mbox]XORxy[mbox]XORx.

链接🔗

「AtCoder 138F」Coincidence

题解

题解源于
直接看原文题解好了，讲的特别清楚
我这里对于原博主的代码进行了一些优化，因为 x&y = x的缘故，所以 x 每一位都会小于等于 y,所以原文中的s是没有必要的

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 64;
const int mod = 1e9+7;
int a[maxd],b[maxd];
long long dp[maxd][2][2][2],n,m;
long long dfs(int p,int l,int r,int f)
{
	//位数，是否填过小于m的值,是否填过大于n的值 ,最高位是否都为1(当前位是否为首位)
	if(p < 0) return 1;
	long long &ans = dp[p][l][r][f];
	// 记忆化搜索
	if(ans) return ans;
	for(int i=0;i<2;i++)  // y
		for(int j=0;j<2;j++) // x
		{
			int nl = l,nr = r,nf = f;
			if(!nf && i && i!=j) continue;
			if((j&i)!=j) continue;		// x&y = 
			if(!nl && j < a[p]) continue; // 如果值小于n了
			if(!nr && i > b[p]) continue; // 如果值大于m了
			if(j > a[p]) nl = 1;
			if(i < b[p]) nr = 1;
			if(j) nf = 1;	

			ans += dfs(p-1,nl,nr,nf);
			ans %= mod;
		}
	return ans;
}
int main()
{
	// freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
	// freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
	scanf("%lld %lld",&n,&m);
	for(int i=0;i<=63;i++) a[i] = (n>>i)&1 , b[i] = (m>>i)&1;
	long long ans = dfs(63,0,0,0);
	printf("%lld",ans);
	return 0;
}

entry.title: 「CodeForces 1238E」Keyboard Purchase
entry.summary:
You have a password which you often type — a string 𝑠 of length 𝑛. Every character of this string is one of the first 𝑚 lowercase Latin letters.

Since you spend a lot of time typing it, you want to buy a new keyboard.

A keyboard is a permutation of the first 𝑚 Latin letters. For example, if 𝑚=3, then there are six possible keyboards: abc, acb, bac, bca, cab and cba.
entry.content:
You have a password which you often type — a string 𝑠 of length 𝑛. Every character of this string is one of the first 𝑚 lowercase Latin letters.

Since you spend a lot of time typing it, you want to buy a new keyboard.

A keyboard is a permutation of the first 𝑚 Latin letters. For example, if 𝑚=3, then there are six possible keyboards: abc, acb, bac, bca, cab and cba.

Since you type your password with one finger, you need to spend time moving your finger from one password character to the next. The time to move from character 𝑠𝑖 to character 𝑠𝑖+1 is equal to the distance between these characters on keyboard. The total time you have to spend typing the password with a keyboard is called the slowness of this keyboard.

More formaly, the slowness of keyboard is equal to ∑𝑖=2𝑛|𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑠𝑖−1−𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑠𝑖|, where 𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑥 is position of letter 𝑥 in keyboard.

For example, if 𝑠 is aacabc and the keyboard is bac, then the total time of typing this password is |𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑎−𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑎|+|𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑎−𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑐|+|𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑐−𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑎|+|𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑎−𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑏|+|𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑏−𝑝𝑜𝑠𝑐| = |2−2|+|2−3|+|3−2|+|2−1|+|1−3| = 0+1+1+1+2=5.

Before buying a new keyboard you want to know the minimum possible slowness that the keyboard can have.

链接🔗

「CodeForces 1238E」Keyboard Purchase

题解

因为 m 很小，所以我们可以考虑状压DP
我们用1表示选，0表示不选，进行位压缩,bit()表示选取的状态
DP[i] 表示选取 bit(i) 需要的最少花费

转移有点难想，需要提前处理出相邻字符的数量 ch[i][j]
每次转移时取上一次状态花费最小的，然后这次的花费为sumi∈bit(i)=1∑j∈bit(j)=0ch[i][j]sum_{i \in bit(i)=1} \sum_{j \in bit(j) = 0} ch[i][j]sumi∈bit(i)=1​∑j∈bit(j)=0​ch[i][j]

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
char s[maxd];
int a[maxd],cnt[25][25],dp[1<<20];
int n,m;
int main()
{
	// freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
	// freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
	scanf("%d %d %s",&n,&m,s+1); 
	int k = m;m=1<<m;
	for(int i=2;i<=n;i++)
	{
		int a = s[i-1] - 'a';
		int b = s[i] - 'a';
		if(a!=b)
		{
			cnt[a][b]++;
			cnt[b][a]++;
		}
	}
	dp[0]=0;
	for(int i=1;i<m;i++)
	{
		dp[i] = 1e9;
		for(int j=0;j<k;j++)
			if(((i>>j)&1))  dp[i] = min(dp[i^(1<<j)],dp[i]);	
		for(int j=0;j<k;j++)
			if((i>>j)&1)
				for(int l=0;l<k;l++)
					if(!((i>>l)&1)) dp[i] += cnt[j][l];
	}
	printf("%d",dp[m-1]);
	return 0;
}

entry.title: 「P2664」 树上游戏
entry.summary:
lrb有一棵树，树的每个节点有个颜色。给一个长度为n的颜色序列，定义s(i,j)s(i,j)s(i,j) 为 iii 到jjj 的颜色数量。以及

f(i)=∑i=1ns(i,j)f(i) = \sum_{i=1}^n s(i,j) f(i)=i=1∑n​s(i,j)

求出所有f(i)f(i)f(i)
entry.content:
lrb有一棵树，树的每个节点有个颜色。给一个长度为n的颜色序列，定义s(i,j)s(i,j)s(i,j) 为 iii 到jjj 的颜色数量。以及

f(i)=∑i=1ns(i,j)f(i) = \sum_{i=1}^n s(i,j) f(i)=i=1∑n​s(i,j)

求出所有f(i)f(i)f(i)

链接🔗

「P2664」 树上游戏

题解

我们可以用某种颜色的点将树切割成块，块内任意两点不会有该颜色的贡献
所以我们可以得到以下结论
1. 某个颜色对于一个点的贡献值为 n - size
2. 某一个点，所有颜色对其的贡献为，n * 颜色数 - 每种颜色节点时所在块的节点数
因为每个点的颜色，对于每个块，我们可以通过差分的思想，得到块的大小 (dfs) 函数

val 表示以该节点父亲为切割点时，该节点的块的大小
root 表示当前所在节点，所有包含次节点的颜色块大小
num 表示第i个颜色块，当前点的贡献

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
struct node
{
	int v,net;
}e[maxd<<1];
int f[maxd],eid;
void insert(int x,int y)
{
	e[eid].net = f[x];
	e[eid].v = y;
	f[x] = eid++; 
}
void init()
{
	memset(f,-1,sizeof(f));
	eid = 0;
}
int n,sum; //总颜色数，根结点被所有颜色块包含块的总大小
int sz[maxd],vis[maxd],col[maxd],del[maxd],val[maxd],num[maxd];
// 子树大小，该颜色是否出现过，颜色,该点颜色删除点数,所在点被父亲颜色切割的块的大小,根所在块被分割的大小
long long ans[maxd],root;
void get_ans(int x,int fa=0)
{
	long long tmp = num[col[fa]];
	root += 1ll * val[x] - num[col[fa]];
	num[col[fa]] = val[x];
	ans[x] = 1ll * n * sum - root + num[col[x]]; // 因为当前点一定会被包含，所以要加上当前颜色
	for(int i = f[x];i+1;i = e[i].net)
	{
		int v = e[i].v;
		if(v == fa) continue;
		get_ans(v,x);
	}
	num[col[fa]] = tmp;
	root -= val[x] - num[col[fa]];
}
void dfs(int x,int fa = 0)
{
	sz[x] = 1;
	int tmp = del[col[fa]]; // 在这之前就已经删除的 父亲颜色
	for(int i=f[x];i+1;i=e[i].net)
	{
		int v = e[i].v;
		if(v == fa) continue;
		dfs(v,x);
		sz[x] += sz[v];
	}
	del[col[x]]++; // 该点颜色删除了
	if(fa)
	{
		val[x] = sz[x] - del[col[fa]] + tmp; // 减去所以删除的点 + 之前删除的点，就是该子树下删除的点
		del[col[fa]] += val[x]; // 将该区块的点加入删除的点
	}
}
int main()
{
	// freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
	// freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
	init();
	scanf("%d",&n);
	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) 
	{
		scanf("%d",&col[i]);
		if(!vis[col[i]]) vis[col[i]]=1,sum++;
	}
	for(int i=1;i<n;i++)
	{	
		int x,y; scanf("%d %d",&x,&y);
		insert(x,y); insert(y,x);
	}
	dfs(1);
	for(int i=1;i<maxd;i++) 
		if(vis[i])  root += 1ll * n - del[i],num[i] = n-del[i]; // 
	get_ans(1);
	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) printf("%lld\n",ans[i]);
	return 0;
}

entry.title: 「AHOI2008」矩形藏宝地
entry.summary: 欢乐岛上最著名的游戏是一个寻宝游戏，小可可来到宝藏的埋藏地，这是一块开阔地，宝藏被分散的埋藏在这块地下，现在要做的是一件件的把宝藏挖出来。为了提示宝藏的埋藏点，游戏的主办方把这块开阔地当作第一象限，将所有可能埋藏宝藏的地方划成一个个矩形的土地，并把这些矩形土地的坐标都告诉了参赛者。挖宝的提示很简单，只要某一个矩阵土地至少被另外一个矩阵土地所包含，那么这个矩阵土地里肯定埋有宝藏。其实这些宝藏都是一些精美的纪念品，如果谁挖出来了纪念品就归谁了，小可可很想为这次旅程画上完美的句号，有你的帮助他信心十足，你只要告诉他：有多少个矩形土地里肯定埋有宝藏就行了。胜利就在眼前，加油吧！
entry.content:
欢乐岛上最著名的游戏是一个寻宝游戏，小可可来到宝藏的埋藏地，这是一块开阔地，宝藏被分散的埋藏在这块地下，现在要做的是一件件的把宝藏挖出来。为了提示宝藏的埋藏点，游戏的主办方把这块开阔地当作第一象限，将所有可能埋藏宝藏的地方划成一个个矩形的土地，并把这些矩形土地的坐标都告诉了参赛者。挖宝的提示很简单，只要某一个矩阵土地至少被另外一个矩阵土地所包含，那么这个矩阵土地里肯定埋有宝藏。其实这些宝藏都是一些精美的纪念品，如果谁挖出来了纪念品就归谁了，小可可很想为这次旅程画上完美的句号，有你的帮助他信心十足，你只要告诉他：有多少个矩形土地里肯定埋有宝藏就行了。胜利就在眼前，加油吧！

链接🔗

「AHOI2008」矩形藏宝地

题解

CDQ分治
排序维护 x2 降序
归并维护 y2 降序
树状数组中用 x1的坐标，存y1的值
然后树状数组求前缀和最小值与当前y1比较

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2e5+10;
struct node
{
    int x1,y1,x2,y2,f;
}e[maxd];
int cmp(const node a,const node b)
{
    return a.x2 > b.x2;
}
int cmp1(const node a,const node b)
{
    return a.y2 > b.y2;
}
int fx[maxd<<1],fy[maxd<<1],totx,toty;
int t[maxd<<1],ans;
void clear(int x)
{
    for(;x<maxd*2;x+=(x&-x)) t[x] = 1e9;
}
void update(int x,int y)
{
    for(;x<maxd*2;x+=(x&-x)) t[x] = min(t[x],y);
}
int query(int x)
{
    int ans = 1e9;
    for(;x;x-=(x&-x)) ans = min(t[x],ans);
    return ans;
}
void cdq(int l,int r)
{
    if(l==r) return;
    int mid = (l+r)/2;
    cdq(l,mid),cdq(mid+1,r);
    sort(e+l,e+mid+1,cmp1); sort(e+mid+1,e+r+1,cmp1); //懒得手动归并，直接排序
    int j = l;
    for(int i=mid+1;i<=r;i++) // 此时j的x2 一定大于i的x2
    {
        if(e[i].f) continue;
        while(j <= mid&&e[j].y2 > e[i].y2) 
            update(e[j].x1,e[j].y1),j++; // 把y1插入数组x1的位置
        int tmp = query(e[i].x1); // 因为查询比 x1小的值，所以查询x1一定小于i的x1;
        if(tmp < e[i].y1) e[i].f = 1,ans++; 
    }
    while(--j>=l) clear(e[j].x1); // 重置
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    int n;scanf("%d",&n);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) 
    {
        scanf("%d %d %d %d",&e[i].x1,&e[i].y1,&e[i].x2,&e[i].y2);
        fx[++totx] = e[i].x1,fx[++totx] = e[i].x2;
        fy[++toty] = e[i].y1,fy[++toty] = e[i].y2;
    }
    sort(fx+1,fx+1+totx);sort(fy+1,fy+1+toty); //离散化 因为不存在相同的，不需要去重复
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
    {
        e[i].x1 = lower_bound(fx+1,fx+1+totx,e[i].x1) - fx;
        e[i].x2 = lower_bound(fx+1,fx+1+totx,e[i].x2) - fx;
        e[i].y1 = lower_bound(fy+1,fy+1+toty,e[i].y1) - fy;
        e[i].y2 = lower_bound(fy+1,fy+1+toty,e[i].y2) - fy;
    }
    sort(e+1,e+1+n,cmp); // 第一维对右x进行排序
    for(int i=1;i<2*maxd;i++) t[i] = 1e9; // 初始化
    cdq(1,n);
    printf("%d",ans);
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「2017 四川省赛」2017 Revenge
entry.summary:
Bobo has n integers a1,a2,…,ana_1, a_2, \dots, a_na1​,a2​,…,an​
He would like to choose some of the integers and calculate their product (the product of the empty set is defined as 1).

Bobo would like to know the number of products whose remainder divided by 2017 is r. As the exact number is too large, he only asks for the number modulo 2.
entry.content:
Bobo has n integers a1,a2,…,ana_1, a_2, \dots, a_na1​,a2​,…,an​
He would like to choose some of the integers and calculate their product (the product of the empty set is defined as 1).

Bobo would like to know the number of products whose remainder divided by 2017 is r. As the exact number is too large, he only asks for the number modulo 2.

链接🔗

「2017 四川省赛」2017 Revenge

题解

首先能想到一个2017 * 1e6 的DP
因为答案%2的原因，我们考虑用bitset进行状压优化
但是乘法不方便进行状态方程的转移
我们发现模数2017是存在原根555的
因此我们可以将每个数aia_iai​映射到 kkk,表示ai=5ka_i = 5^kai​=5k
然后转移的时候，就可以将乘法转化为加法操作

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <iostream>
#include <bitset>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
const int maxd = 2100;
int I[maxd],n,m; // I[i]表示i第个数是5的I[i]次方
void init()
{
    int now = 1;
    for(int i=0;i<2016;i++) I[now] = i,now = 5*now%2017;
}
bitset<2016> dp;
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w" ,stdout);
    init();
    while(scanf("%d %d",&n,&m)!=EOF)
    {
        dp.reset();
        dp.set(0);
        for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
        {
            int x;scanf("%d",&x); x = I[x];
            //dp[i+1][j] = dp[i][j] + dp[i][(j+x)%2017]
            dp^=(dp<<x)|(dp >> (2016 - x));
        }
        printf("%d\n",(int)dp[I[m]]);
    }
    return 0;
}

entry.title: 「AtCoder 141F」Xor Sum 3
entry.summary:
We have N non-negative integers: A1,A2,…,AN.

Consider painting at least one and at most N−1 integers among them in red, and painting the rest in blue.

Let the beauty of the painting be the [mbox][mbox][mbox]XOR of the integers painted in red, plus the [mbox][mbox][mbox]XOR of the integers painted in blue.

Find the maximum possible beauty of the painting.
entry.content:
We have N non-negative integers: A1,A2,…,AN.

Consider painting at least one and at most N−1 integers among them in red, and painting the rest in blue.

Let the beauty of the painting be the [mbox][mbox][mbox]XOR of the integers painted in red, plus the [mbox][mbox][mbox]XOR of the integers painted in blue.

Find the maximum possible beauty of the painting.

链接🔗

「AtCoder 141F」Xor Sum 3

题解

线性基
我们先将1-n所有值的异或和sum求出来
然后因为要将该堆分为两堆，值位1的位只能分为0和1，但是值位0的位能分为1和1，意味着可以白嫖
所以在线性基中，我们优先考虑从0的位，由高到底开始选

代码

#include <cstdio>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
using namespace std;
typedef long long ll;
const int maxd = 1e5+10;
ll p[maxd],a[maxd],sum,ans;
int t[maxd],tot,n;
void insert(ll x)
{
    for(int i=1;i<=tot;i++)
        if((x>>t[i])&1)
        {
            if(p[i]) x^= p[i];
            else
            {
                p[i]=x;
                break;
            }
        }
}
int main()
{
    // freopen("a.in","r",stdin);
    // freopen("k.out","w",stdout);
    scanf("%d",&n);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) scanf("%lld",&a[i]);
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) sum ^= a[i];
    for(int i=60;i>=0;i--) if(( (sum>>i)&1) == 0) t[++tot]=i;
    for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) insert(a[i]);
    for(int i=1;i<=tot;i++) 
        if(((ans >>t[i])&1) == 0) ans ^=p[i];
    printf("%lld\n",ans+(sum^ans));
    return 0;
}
